description_long: This object is a polygonal barrel with a faceted, slightly tapered cylindrical body, colored in a rich brown hue. Three prominent horizontal bands, rendered in a contrasting gray, encircle the barrel at regular intervals, each band featuring evenly spaced rectangular protrusions that suggest reinforcement or structural support. The top and bottom faces are flat and polygonal, with the top appearing to be closed and lacking any visible opening or lid. The surface of the barrel is smooth and untextured, giving it a stylized, almost cartoon-like appearance. There are no visible handles, spouts, or decorative markings on any side. The overall design suggests durability and utility, suitable for storage or containment in an urban or industrial setting.
description: A stylized brown barrel with three gray reinforcement bands and a faceted, closed top. The surface is smooth and unmarked, with no handles or visible openings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the brown faceted body and three gray bands with protrusions, no visible handles or markings.
description_view_1: Side view similar to the front, highlighting the symmetry and even spacing of the gray reinforcement bands.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same banding and lack of distinguishing features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the uniform banding and smooth, unmarked surface.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: plastic reinforcement rings at three intervals
